the native, benefic results would be there for the coming years
of the native under the above periods, It is essential & beneficial
to know the directions of the signs. (Mesha, Simha & Dhanus
will be in East direction and planets posited in these 3 signs will
be considered as conjoined in one sign I one direction). As per
Parashara System, any trines i.e. 1, 5, 9 signs will be in one
direction.
As an example, if Saturn is posited in East, in another sign
of East if Mars & Ketu are posited it is considered that there is
Saturn+ Mars + Ketu combination. Saturn will have an egoistic
natured Mars & obstructive planet Ketu in combination i.e. if
these 3 planets are conjoined in one sign or posited in 1, 5, 9
signs, the native will have break in service, harassment from
enemies & pinpricks without fail,
In another example, if Mars is in Vrishabha, Moon is in
